info.title: Klaviyo API
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
Get all data sources in an account.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_data_sources.json)

post.description:
Create a new data source in an account

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/create_data_source.json)

get.description:
Retrieve a data source in an account.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_data_source.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the data source

schema.description: The ID of the data source

delete.description:
Delete a data source in an account.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/delete_data_source.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the data source to delete

schema.description: The ID of the data source to delete

get.description:
Get the object record with the given compound ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_object_record.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The compound ID of the object record, formatted as object_type_id:::object_record_id

schema.description: The compound ID of the object record, formatted as object_type_id:::object_record_id

post.description:
Create a bulk data source record import job to create a batch of records. Accepts up to 500 records per request. The maximum allowed payload size is 4MB. The maximum allowed payload size per-record is 512KB. To learn more, see our [Custom Objects API overview](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/reference/custom_objects_api_overview).

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `15/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/bulk_create_data_source_records.json)

requestBody.description: Create a data source record job

post.description:
Create a data source record import job to create a single record. The maximum allowed payload size per-record is 512KB. To learn more, see our [Custom Objects API overview](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/reference/custom_objects_api_overview).

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/create_data_source_record.json)

requestBody.description: Create a data source record job

post.description:
Delete a batch of object records. Accepts up to 500 object record IDs per request. The maximum allowed payload size is 5MB.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/bulk_delete_object_records.json)

get.summary: Get Ingestion Logs for Object Type
get.description:
Get the ingestion logs for a given object type. Only ingestion failures are logged — the absence of a log entry for a record does not mean the record was ingested successfully. Logs are retained for 14 days; time filters outside that window return an empty page. Results are returned newest first with a fixed page size of 50.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `1/s`
Steady: `15/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_ingestion_logs_for_object_type.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ULID ID of the object type.

schema.description: The ULID ID of the object type.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`record_id`: `equals`
`status`: `any`, `equals`
`event_type`: `any`, `equals`
`timestamp`: `greater-or-equal`, `less-than`

get.summary: Get Ingestion Log IDs for Object Type
get.description:
Get the ingestion logs for a given object type. Only ingestion failures are logged — the absence of a log entry for a record does not mean the record was ingested successfully. Logs are retained for 14 days; time filters outside that window return an empty page. Results are returned newest first with a fixed page size of 50.

*Rate limits*:

Steady: `15/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_ingestion_log_ids_for_object_type.json)

id.description: The ID of the schema property. Must be a postive integer.

name.description: The name of the schema property

type.description: The type of the schema property

description.description: The description of the schema property

AgentHints.description: Optional hints emitted by the API for agent callers

next_steps.description: Suggested follow-up actions for agents to take after this response

id.description: Property ID. Must be a positive integer.

value.description: Constant value assigned to every record

id_path.description: JSONPath data selector to owning ID

related_id_path.description: JSONPath data selector to related ID

update_strategy.description: Strategy for updating relationships with each new RawDataRecord ingestion

message.example: Input should be a valid string

property.description: The path of the record property that failed validation.

invalid_value.description: The value that failed validation, JSON-encoded as a string.

id.description: The unique ID of the ingestion log entry.

status.description: The severity of the log entry.

event_type.description: The type of ingestion event that produced this log entry.

timestamp.description: The date and time when the event occurred.

summary.description: A short human-readable summary of the event.

errors.description: The validation errors for this event. Empty when no structured error detail is available; see `summary` in that case.

id.description: The object type these logs belong to.
The object record that produced this event. Present only when the event is associated with a record; the record may not resolve if it failed validation.

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15/reference/api-overview#authentication
